---
title: "Power_Analysis_Project2"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(powertools)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
data <- read.csv("C:/Users/kokeshem/Spring 2026/Advanced Data Analysis/BIOS6624/Project2/DataRaw/PrelimData.csv")
```
#Aim 1 Power Calculations: Omnibus F test
```{r}

#preliminary data correlations
rho_cvlt_il6  <- abs(cor(data$CVLT_CNG3, data$IL_6,  use = "complete.obs"))
rho_cvlt_mcp1 <- abs(cor(data$CVLT_CNG3, data$MCP_1, use = "complete.obs"))
rho_cort_il6  <- abs(cor(data$CORT_CNG3, data$IL_6,  use = "complete.obs"))
rho_cort_mcp1 <- abs(cor(data$CORT_CNG3, data$MCP_1, use = "complete.obs"))

#linear models for overall f test
fit_cvlt <- lm(CVLT_CNG3 ~ IL_6 + MCP_1, data = data)
fit_cort <- lm(CORT_CNG3 ~ IL_6 + MCP_1, data = data)
summary(fit_cvlt)
summary(fit_cort)

Rsq_cvlt <- summary(fit_cvlt)$r.squared
Rsq_cort <- summary(fit_cort)$r.squared

pilot_summary <- data.frame(
  quantity = c(
    "Rsq_cvlt",
    "Rsq_cort",
    "rho_cvlt_il6",
    "rho_cvlt_mcp1",
    "rho_cort_il6",
    "rho_cort_mcp1"
  ),
  value = c(
    Rsq_cvlt,
    Rsq_cort,
    rho_cvlt_il6,
    rho_cvlt_mcp1,
    rho_cort_il6,
    rho_cort_mcp1
  )
)

print(pilot_summary)

#alpha levels
alpha_grid <- data.frame(
  strategy = c(
    "Unadjusted (alpha = 0.05)",
    "More strict alpha = 0.01",
    "Bonferroni across Aim 1 primary tests (48 tests)- conservative"
  ),
  alpha = c(
    0.05,
    0.01,
    0.05 / 48
  )
)

print(alpha_grid)

#planned final sample size, predictors for mlrF.overall test
N_final <- 175
p_omnibus <- 2

omnibus_inputs <- data.frame(
  outcome_family = c("Episodic Memory Change (CVLT_CNG3)", "Cortical Thickness Change (CORT_CNG3)"),
  Rsq = c(Rsq_cvlt, Rsq_cort)
)

aim1_omnibus_results <- merge(omnibus_inputs, alpha_grid, by = NULL)

#power at N = 175
aim1_omnibus_results$power_at_N175 <- mapply(
  function(Rsq, alpha) {
    mlrF.overall(
      N = N_final,
      p = p_omnibus,
      Rsq = Rsq,
      alpha = alpha,
      power = NULL
    )
  },
  Rsq = aim1_omnibus_results$Rsq,
  alpha = aim1_omnibus_results$alpha
)

#N needed for 80% power
aim1_omnibus_results$N_for_80pct_power <- mapply(
  function(Rsq, alpha) {
    mlrF.overall(
      N = NULL,
      p = p_omnibus,
      Rsq = Rsq,
      alpha = alpha,
      power = 0.80
    )
  },
  Rsq = aim1_omnibus_results$Rsq,
  alpha = aim1_omnibus_results$alpha
)

print(aim1_omnibus_results)


#results table
aim1_omnibus_table <- aim1_omnibus_results %>%
  mutate(
    Rsq = round(Rsq, 3),
    alpha = round(alpha, 4),
    power_at_N175 = round(power_at_N175, 3),
    N_for_80pct_power = round(N_for_80pct_power, 1)
  ) %>%
  select(
    outcome_family,
    strategy,
    alpha,
    Rsq,
    power_at_N175,
    N_for_80pct_power
  )

gt(aim1_omnibus_table) %>%
  cols_label(
    outcome_family = "Outcome family",
    strategy = "Type I error control",
    alpha = html("&alpha;"),
    Rsq = html("Pilot R<sup>2</sup>"),
    power_at_N175 = "Power at N = 175",
    N_for_80pct_power = "Required N for 80% power"
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Aim 1 omnibus power calculations",
    subtitle = "Based on preliminary two-predictor models using IL-6 and MCP-1"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(alpha, Rsq, power_at_N175),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = N_for_80pct_power,
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(alpha, Rsq, power_at_N175, N_for_80pct_power)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste(
      "Power calculations were conducted using mlrF.overall() from the powertools package.",
      "Pilot R^2 values were taken from preliminary linear models relating IL-6 and MCP-1",
      "to CVLT_CNG3 and CORT_CNG3. The Bonferroni-adjusted alpha used a denominator of 12,",
      "corresponding to 6 outcomes across 2 Aim 1 hypotheses for omnibus outcome-level tests."
    )
  )

```





#Aim 1: Power for simple associations between each predictor and outcome using corr.1samp()
```{r}

#combined pilot correlation grid for aim 1
#using the observed pilot range without separating outcomes in the final display
rho_grid_aim1 <- data.frame(
  effect_label = c("0.26","0.32","0.60","0.69"),
  rho = c(
    rho_cvlt_il6,
    rho_cvlt_mcp1,
    rho_cort_il6,
    rho_cort_mcp1
  )
)

print(rho_grid_aim1)

#combine effect sizes with type I error strategies
aim1_corr_results <- merge(rho_grid_aim1, alpha_grid, by = NULL)

#power at N = 175
aim1_corr_results$power_at_N175 <- mapply(
  function(rho, alpha) {
    corr.1samp(
      N = N_final,
      rhoA = rho,
      rho0 = 0,
      alpha = alpha,
      power = NULL,
      sides = 2
    )
  },
  rho = aim1_corr_results$rho,
  alpha = aim1_corr_results$alpha
)


#calculate n needed for 80% power
aim1_corr_results$N_for_80pct_power <- mapply(
  function(rho, alpha) {
    corr.1samp(
      N = NULL,
      rhoA = rho,
      rho0 = 0,
      alpha = alpha,
      power = 0.80,
      sides = 2
    )
  },
  rho = aim1_corr_results$rho,
  alpha = aim1_corr_results$alpha
)

print(aim1_corr_results)

#combined results table
aim1_corr_table <- aim1_corr_results %>%
  mutate(
    rho = round(rho, 2),
    alpha = round(alpha, 4),
    power_at_N175 = round(power_at_N175, 3),
    N_for_80pct_power = round(N_for_80pct_power, 0)
  ) %>%
  select(
    effect_label,
    strategy,
    alpha,
    rho,
    power_at_N175,
    N_for_80pct_power
  )

gt(aim1_corr_table) %>%
  cols_label(
    effect_label = "Representative effect size",
    strategy = "Type I error control",
    alpha = html("&alpha;"),
    rho = html("Pilot |&rho;|"),
    power_at_N175 = "Power at N = 175",
    N_for_80pct_power = "Required N for 80% power"
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Aim 1 combined correlation-based power calculations",
    subtitle = "Based on representative pilot effect sizes across preliminary outcomes"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(alpha, rho, power_at_N175),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = N_for_80pct_power,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(alpha, rho, power_at_N175, N_for_80pct_power)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste(
      "Power calculations were conducted using corr.1samp() from the powertools package.",
      "Representative effect sizes were taken from the observed pilot correlation range",
      "across preliminary memory and cortical thickness outcomes."
    )
  )

#aim 1 threshold table
#smallest representative effect size achieving at least 80% power at n = 175
aim1_threshold_table <- aim1_corr_results %>%
  group_by(strategy, alpha) %>%
  filter(power_at_N175 >= 0.80) %>%
  arrange(rho, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    rho = round(rho, 2),
    alpha = round(alpha, 4),
    power_at_N175 = round(power_at_N175, 3),
    N_for_80pct_power = round(N_for_80pct_power, 0)
  ) %>%
  select(
    strategy,
    alpha,
    rho,
    power_at_N175,
    N_for_80pct_power
  )

gt(aim1_threshold_table) %>%
  cols_label(
    strategy = "Type I error control",
    alpha = html("&alpha;"),
    rho = html("Minimum pilot |&rho;| reaching 80% power"),
    power_at_N175 = "Power at N = 175",
    N_for_80pct_power = "Required N for 80% power"
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Aim 1 power thresholds at N = 175",
    subtitle = "Smallest representative effect size achieving at least 80% power"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(alpha, rho, power_at_N175),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = N_for_80pct_power,
    decimals = 0
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(alpha, rho, power_at_N175, N_for_80pct_power)
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste(
      "Thresholds were derived from corr.1samp() results using the representative pilot effect-size range.",
      "The table complements the Aim 1 figure by summarizing the minimum detectable correlation under each",
      "type I error strategy at the planned sample size of 175."
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#combined aim 1 presentation graph
ggplot(
  aim1_corr_results,
  aes(x = rho, y = power_at_N175, color = strategy, group = strategy)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Aim 1 Power for Representative Effect Sizes",
    subtitle = "N = 175",
    x = "Preliminary Effect Size (|rho|)",
    y = "Power",
    color = "type I error control"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(.7, 1)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```



#Aim 2: Power to detect differences in correlations between amyloid+ and amyloid- groups using corr.2samp()
```{r}
library(powertools)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)

#fixed total sample size
N_total <- 175

#main alpha for presentation graph
alpha_main <- 0.05

#alpha grid for supplemental tables
alpha_grid_aim2 <- data.frame(
  strategy = c(
    "unadjusted (alpha = 0.05)",
    "more stringent alpha = 0.01",
    "bonferroni across aim 2 primary tests (24 tests)"
  ),
  alpha = c(
    0.05,
    0.01,
    0.05 / 24
  )
)

print(alpha_grid_aim2)

#splits for presentation and supplemental results
#group 1 = amyloid+, group 2 = amyloid-
#n.ratio = n2 / n1
split_grid_aim2 <- data.frame(
  split_label = c("50:50", "60:40", "70:30"),
  prop_pos = c(0.50, 0.60, 0.70)
) %>%
  mutate(
    n1_fixed = round(N_total * prop_pos),
    n2_fixed = N_total - n1_fixed,
    n.ratio = n2_fixed / n1_fixed
  )

print(split_grid_aim2)

#helper for corr.2samp power at fixed n
power_corr2_fixedN <- function(n1, n.ratio, rho1, rho2, alpha) {
  out <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(
      corr.2samp(
        n1 = n1,
        n.ratio = n.ratio,
        rho1 = rho1,
        rho2 = rho2,
        alpha = alpha,
        power = NULL,
        sides = 2
      )
    ),
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
  as.numeric(out)
}

#helper to search for total n needed for 80% power
find_totalN_for_power_corr2 <- function(rho1, rho2, prop_pos, alpha,
                                        target_power = 0.80,
                                        N_min = 20,
                                        N_max = 3000) {
  for (N in N_min:N_max) {
    n1 <- round(N * prop_pos)
    n2 <- N - n1

    if (n1 <= 3 || n2 <= 3) next

    n.ratio <- n2 / n1

    pw <- tryCatch(
      suppressWarnings(
        corr.2samp(
          n1 = n1,
          n.ratio = n.ratio,
          rho1 = rho1,
          rho2 = rho2,
          alpha = alpha,
          power = NULL,
          sides = 2
        )
      ),
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )

    pw <- as.numeric(pw)

    if (!is.na(pw) && pw >= target_power) {
      return(N)
    }
  }

  return(NA_real_)
}

#grid for presentation figure
#rho2 = assumed baseline cytokine-outcome correlation in the amyloid- group
#these values are set a bit weaker than the overall pilot range so that
#the overall pilot correlations can plausibly sit between amyloid- and amyloid+
#rho1 = rho2 - diff_corr, so the amyloid+ group always has a more negative correlation
#differences are chosen to match the figure style in the example document
plot_grid_aim2 <- merge(
  data.frame(rho2 = c(-0.15, -0.25, -0.35, -0.45)),
  data.frame(diff_corr = c(0.10, 0.20, 0.30, 0.40)),
  by = NULL
) %>%
  merge(split_grid_aim2, by = NULL) %>%
  mutate(
    rho1 = rho2 - diff_corr,
    facet_label = paste0("amyloid- |rho| = ", abs(rho2))
  ) %>%
  filter(rho1 > -0.95, rho1 < 0.95)

#power for presentation graph at alpha = 0.05
plot_grid_aim2$power <- mapply(
  function(n1, n.ratio, rho1, rho2) {
    power_corr2_fixedN(
      n1 = n1,
      n.ratio = n.ratio,
      rho1 = rho1,
      rho2 = rho2,
      alpha = alpha_main
    )
  },
  n1 = plot_grid_aim2$n1_fixed,
  n.ratio = plot_grid_aim2$n.ratio,
  rho1 = plot_grid_aim2$rho1,
  rho2 = plot_grid_aim2$rho2
)

print(plot_grid_aim2)

#main presentation graph
ggplot(
  plot_grid_aim2,
  aes(x = diff_corr, y = power, color = split_label, group = split_label)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.80, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  facet_wrap(~ facet_label, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Power to Detect Difference between Amyloid+ and Amyloid- Groups",
    subtitle = "Aim 2 Representative Power Analysis, n = 175, alpha = 0.05",
    x = "Difference in Correlations",
    y = "power",
    color = "amyloid+ : amyloid- ratio"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

#full supplemental results grid
supp_grid_aim2 <- plot_grid_aim2 %>%
  select(split_label, prop_pos, n1_fixed, n2_fixed, n.ratio,
         rho1, rho2, diff_corr, facet_label) %>%
  merge(alpha_grid_aim2, by = NULL)

supp_grid_aim2$power_at_N175 <- mapply(
  function(n1, n.ratio, rho1, rho2, alpha) {
    power_corr2_fixedN(
      n1 = n1,
      n.ratio = n.ratio,
      rho1 = rho1,
      rho2 = rho2,
      alpha = alpha
    )
  },
  n1 = supp_grid_aim2$n1_fixed,
  n.ratio = supp_grid_aim2$n.ratio,
  rho1 = supp_grid_aim2$rho1,
  rho2 = supp_grid_aim2$rho2,
  alpha = supp_grid_aim2$alpha
)

supp_grid_aim2$N_total_for_80pct_power <- mapply(
  function(rho1, rho2, prop_pos, alpha) {
    find_totalN_for_power_corr2(
      rho1 = rho1,
      rho2 = rho2,
      prop_pos = prop_pos,
      alpha = alpha,
      target_power = 0.80,
      N_min = 20,
      N_max = 3000
    )
  },
  rho1 = supp_grid_aim2$rho1,
  rho2 = supp_grid_aim2$rho2,
  prop_pos = supp_grid_aim2$prop_pos,
  alpha = supp_grid_aim2$alpha
)

#display version for tables
supp_grid_aim2$N_total_for_80pct_power_display <- ifelse(
  is.na(supp_grid_aim2$N_total_for_80pct_power),
  ">3000",
  as.character(round(supp_grid_aim2$N_total_for_80pct_power, 0))
)

print(supp_grid_aim2)

#aim 2 representative alpha table
#fix split = 60:40, baseline amyloid- correlation = -0.25, difference = 0.20
aim2_alpha_table <- supp_grid_aim2 %>%
  filter(
    split_label == "60:40",
    rho2 == -0.25,
    diff_corr == 0.20
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    rho1 = round(rho1, 2),
    rho2 = round(rho2, 2),
    diff_corr = round(diff_corr, 2),
    alpha = round(alpha, 4),
    power_at_N175 = round(power_at_N175, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(
    strategy,
    alpha,
    rho1,
    rho2,
    diff_corr,
    power_at_N175,
    N_total_for_80pct_power_display
  )

gt(aim2_alpha_table) %>%
  cols_label(
    strategy = "Type I error control",
    alpha = html("&alpha;"),
    rho1 = html("&rho;<sub>1</sub> amyloid+"),
    rho2 = html("&rho;<sub>2</sub> amyloid-"),
    diff_corr = "Difference in correlations",
    power_at_N175 = "Power at N = 175",
    N_total_for_80pct_power_display = "Required total N for 80% power"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(alpha, rho1, rho2, diff_corr, power_at_N175),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = everything()
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Aim 2 alpha sensitivity under a representative scenario",
    subtitle = "60:40 split, baseline amyloid- |rho| = 0.25, difference = 0.20"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste(
      "Representative scenario chosen as a middle-ground planning case.",
      "The full pattern across splits, baseline correlations, and differences is shown in the Aim 2 figure."
    )
  )
```
